title: Smoky Smoked Tomato Stir-fry
description: A low-calorie-friendly smoky and crispy Brazilian dish featuring diced tomatoes that satisfies a midnight craving.
instructions: Chop the tomatoes into small cubes.
Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and red pepper flakes to the heated oil, stir for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Fold in the tomato pieces, add smoked paprika, and salt. Stir well to coat evenly with seasoning.
Reduce heat to low and let it simmer until the tomatoes start to soften and release their juices, approximately 5-7 minutes.
Turn off the heat immediately after observing a reduction of liquid from the tomatoes.
